This is a testharness.js-based test.
[FAIL] Trusted Type violation report: evaluating a string.
  assert_equals: a single violation reported expected 1 but got 2
[FAIL] Trusted Type violation report: evaluating a Trusted Script.
  assert_equals: no violation reported expected 0 but got 1
[FAIL] Trusted Type violation report: default policy runs in report-only mode.
  assert_equals: no violation reported expected 0 but got 1
Harness: the test ran to completion.
